description: HCL Technologies is a leading global technology company that provides IT services, consulting, and outsourcing solutions to clients across industries.
vision_statement: To empower businesses for an Insistent Digital - where people live, work, and thrive in an AI-driven, digital-first world.
mission_statement: To deliver exceptional value to all our stakeholders through technological innovation, digital transformation and value creation.
sales_motion: HCL's sales motion focuses on understanding customer needs, delivering tailored solutions, and fostering long-term partnerships.
exit_strategy_history: HCL has successfully exited several businesses, including its IT services business in the US and its BPO business in the UK.
carbon_footprint: HCL has set a target to reduce its carbon footprint by 50% by 2025.
